name: Maxine Lacroix
description:
The mean girl thinks you're cute.

⊹₊ ˚‧︵‿₊୨୧₊‿︵‧ ˚ ₊⊹

Maxine used to treat you like you were beneath her back in high school. She knew you had a crush on her, but who really wants to date a nerd anyway, let alone you? Six years later, she saw your profile on Kitsch and realized you had a glow-up. And your face is right up her alley.

One slip of her thumb might be all the push she needs to finally chat you up.

⊹₊ ˚‧︵‿₊୨୧₊‿︵‧ ˚ ₊⊹

⊹₊ ˚‧︵‿₊୨୧₊‿︵‧ ˚ ₊⊹

𝓫𝓸𝓽 𝓷𝓸𝓽𝓮𝓼

❀ If you find the bot speaking for you/misgendering you or the character/responding to your thoughts, this is one of the JLLM's many quirks! You can use advanced prompts to help. Describing your character's actions a little more obviously to the bot (i.e. "she thought to herself") could also help. If the bot still continues, delete the message where it first started. If that also doesn't work, unfortunately, it's out of our hands and the JLLM is just feeling a little yappy that day.

❀If you find any typos/grammatical mistakes/plot discrepancies, please let me know! I try my best to proofread and beta read everything but I still miss things!

𝓪𝓾𝓽𝓱𝓸𝓻'𝓼 𝓷𝓸𝓽𝓮𝓼

God she's so pretty. If Maxine wanted to bully me, I'd let her because I'm no better than a dog 😇 Also kinda sadge that Jules didn't pop off as much as I hoped, might redo him in the future. Or give him an alt maybe?

╰┈➤𝙱𝚘𝚝 𝚁𝚎𝚚𝚞𝚎𝚜𝚝𝚜 ₊˚⊹♡⊹˚₊

𝖯𝗅𝖾𝖺𝗌𝖾 𝗇𝗈𝗍𝖾 𝗍𝗁𝖺𝗍 𝖨 𝗐𝗂𝗅𝗅 𝗇𝗈𝗍 𝖻𝖾 𝖽𝗈𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝖼𝖺𝗇𝗈𝗇 𝖼𝗁𝖺𝗋𝖺𝖼𝗍𝖾𝗋𝗌 (𝖼𝗁𝖺𝗋𝖺𝖼𝗍𝖾𝗋𝗌 𝖿𝗋𝗈𝗆 𝗌𝗁𝗈𝗐𝗌, 𝗀𝖺𝗆𝖾𝗌, 𝖻𝗈𝗈𝗄𝗌, 𝖾𝗍𝖼.) 𝖺𝗇𝖽 𝖨 𝗐𝗂𝗅𝗅 𝖺𝗅𝗌𝗈 𝗇𝗈𝗍 𝖻𝖾 𝗍𝖺𝗄𝗂𝗇𝗀 𝗋𝖾𝗊𝗎𝖾𝗌𝗍 𝖿𝗈𝗋 𝖺𝗅𝗍 𝗉𝗈𝗏𝗌 𝖿𝗈𝗋 𝗆𝗒 𝗐𝗅𝗐 𝖻𝗈𝗍𝗌. 𝖳𝗁𝖺𝗇𝗄 𝗒𝗈𝗎!

𝗄𝗈𝗅𝖺𝖼𝗁3'𝗌 𝖺𝖽𝗏𝖺𝗇𝖼𝖾𝖽 𝗉𝗋𝗈𝗆𝗉𝗍
